name: Microsoft Azure Monitor
description: This plugin supports ingestion of Alerts (DLP, Malware, Policy, Compromised Credential, Malsite, Quarantine, Remediation, Security Assessment, Watchlist, UBA, CTEP, Device, Content), Events (Page, Application, Audit, Infrastructure, Network, Incident, Endpoint, Client Status). The data will be ingested in the Microsoft Azure Monitor Log Analytics Workspace table. This plugin supports ingestion in CEF and JSON format.

configuration.label: Directory (tenant) ID
configuration.description: Directory (tenant) ID of Microsoft Entra ID application.

configuration.label: Application (client) ID
configuration.description: Application (client) ID of Microsoft Entra ID application.

configuration.label: Client Secret
configuration.description: Client Secret of Microsoft Entra ID application.

configuration.label: DCR Immutable ID
configuration.description: Immutable ID of Data Collection Rule.

configuration.label: Custom Log Table Name
configuration.description: Custom Log Table name for ingesting data. Make sure that the Table exists in Log Analytics Workspace.

configuration.label: Log Source Identifier
configuration.description: This will be added in Application field of the Custom Log Table.
